rulings.Case Title: CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYD'S LONDON VS. BP AMERICA INC., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Motion For Summar Judgement To Be Filed Under Seal
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 14, 2009, line 4, PLAINTIFF CERTAIN UNDERWRITERS AT LLOYD'S LONDON, CERTAIN LONDON MARKET COMPANIES, NORTH RIVER INSURANCE COMPANY, and, CERTAIN ADDITIONAL LONDON MARKET COMPANIES' Motion For Summary Judgement To Be Filed Under Seal. Denied, without prejudice. Moving Party fails to comply with CRC, Rule 2.550(d), which requires that the proposed sealing be narowly tailored (e.g. only necessary portions of documents should be redacted, as opposed to redacting an entire document. =(302KOPP/VC)

rulings.Case Title: ANTONIO MOLINAR VS. MARCIA BROWNE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Mtn And Special Anti-Slapp Mtn To Strike Pltfs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, April 14, 2009, line 9, DEFENDANT MARCIA BROWNE Special Anti-SLAPP Motion To Strike Plaintiff's Complaint. 1. CCP section 425.16(f) requires that an anti-SLAPP motion be filed within sixty days of service. Here, service was made on October 28, 2008. 2. Motion is Denied. Defendant's motion is untimely under CCP section 425.16(f) and defendant has not demonstrated good cause for relief. =(302KOPP/PB)
